summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Dra. Brinquinho API completed. All 27 pytest tests pass against the production preview URL. Covered: dashboard, products CRUD with auto-SKU, patients CRUD, appointments CRUD with +45d post_sale_date computation, mark-reminder-sent endpoint, payment methods (defaults + CRUD), sales (PIX no-fee, Cartão Crédito with 3.99% fee, profit/net/fee calculations, post_sale_date, receive_date +30d for cards), month filter on /api/sales, stock decrement on sale creation and restore on deletion, pending reminders window (-7 to +14 days), and /api/reports/monthly aggregation pipeline.

minor.issue: Uses ProductCreate (all optional except name); a request without sku falls back to existing sku — works but business validation is minimal (no required-field enforcement beyond name).
Window is hardcoded (-7d..+14d). Same window is replicated in /api/dashboard. Consider extracting to a shared helper to avoid drift.
Stock is decremented but is allowed to go negative (no validation that stock_qty >= item.qty). Could cause inventory inconsistency.
card_fee_pct is only applied when payment method is_card=True; a non-card method with non-zero card_fee_pct will silently ignore the fee.

action_items: (Optional) Validate stock before decrementing on POST /api/sales to avoid negative stock.
(Optional) Extract reminder window (-7d..+14d) into a shared constant/helper used by /dashboard and /reminders/pending.
(Optional) Add validation: appointment date format YYYY-MM-DD; sale_date format; reject malformed strings explicitly (currently compute_post_sale_date silently returns '').
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.95).
Stock can go negative on /api/sales since there is no stock_qty validation before $inc -qty.
No request validation on YYYY-MM-DD date inputs; compute_post_sale_date silently swallows parse errors and stores empty string — could mask bugs.
ensure_default_payment_methods is called both at startup and from GET /api/payment-methods (defensive; OK but redundant).
Duplicated reminder-window logic in dashboard() and pending_reminders() — DRY violation.
Mongo _id is correctly excluded with projection {'_id': 0} throughout — good.
All endpoints under /api prefix — good. Env vars used correctly (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL).
server.py is ~585 lines; still manageable but approaching the threshold to split into routers/models/services modules.
test_credentials: N/A (system has no auth per user choice)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed products, patients, appointments and sales. Sales/appointments created mid-test are cleaned up. TEST_ products/patients remain in DB (idempotent for re-runs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. Tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and hit REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Re-run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Reminder-window test uses today-40d to ensure post_sale_date lands inside today-7..today+14 window — keep this in mind if tests run near a DST/timezone boundary.
rca of the issue: N/A — no production bugs found. Single initial test failure (TestReminders) was a test-side off-by-one (used today-30d → post_sale_date=today+15d which is 1 day outside the today+14d cap). Fixed by changing to today-40d.
